meaning: n.<英>(通过节食、运动等)减轻体重者,减肥者
examples: Readers are paying more for slimmer products.
One will find himself slimmer than before if he succeeds in giving up taking much sugar and fat.
Her new slimmer figure filled her with confidence, so the mother-of-two asked Pete to marry her again so she could have a wedding album she could be proud of.
Peers backed the change by 187 votes to 159, a slimmer majority of 28 votes.
When compared to the XZ-2, the XZ-10 is slimmer with a 40% smaller volume.
